summary: Planned Phase 6 (Constraint Migration) — 8 tasks adding GraphConstraintAdapter to packages/graph and enhancing buildDependencyGraph, validateDependencies, and detectCircularDepsInFiles with optional graph-based dependency data.
pending: Task 2: Add GraphDependencyData type to core constraints
Task 3: Enhance buildDependencyGraph with graph data (TDD)
Task 4: Enhance validateDependencies with graph data (TDD)
Task 5: Enhance detectCircularDepsInFiles with graph data (TDD)
Task 6: Write core constraint integration tests
concerns: Core cannot import from graph package (circular dependency) — solved by passing plain objects
DependencyGraph and GraphDependencyData have same shape — core type uses mutable, graph uses readonly
Layer resolution still uses minimatch patterns — graph mode doesn't change this (layers are config, not graph data)
decisions: GraphConstraintAdapter computes DependencyGraph-compatible data from GraphStore
buildDependencyGraph short-circuits when graph data provided — returns it directly
validateDependencies skips parser health check and file globbing when graph data provided
detectCircularDepsInFiles skips file parsing when graph data provided
Skill updates (enforce-architecture) deferred to Phase 7 per established pattern
